title Containers — openmeter

  Container(cmd_sink_worker_main_go, "sink-worker", "worker")
}
System_Boundary(b_collector, "collector") {
  Container(collector_cmd_main_go, "cmd", "app")
}
System_Boundary(b_tools, "tools") {
  Container(tools_migrate_cmd_viewgen_main_go, "viewgen", "app")
}
